discovery.name: LEGAL_EMPLOYER_BU
discovery.sql: SELECT le.name AS LENAME, bu.name AS BUNAME FROM (SELECT otl.name, otl.organization_id FROM hr_org_unit_classifications_f c JOIN hr_organization_units_f_tl otl ON c.organization_id = otl.organization_id AND otl.language = 'US' WHERE c.classification_code = 'HCM_LEMP' AND otl.name = 'US1 Legal Entity' AND SYSDATE BETWEEN c.effective_start_date AND c.effective_end_date AND ROWNUM = 1) le CROSS JOIN (SELECT otl.name FROM hr_organization_units_f_tl otl WHERE otl.language = 'US' AND otl.name = 'US1 Business Unit' AND ROWNUM = 1) bu

base_read.sql: SELECT person_number AS PERSON_NUMBER, MAX(person_id) AS PERSON_ID FROM per_all_people_f WHERE person_number LIKE :PREFIX || 'DMTW%' GROUP BY person_number
